Game.Name: Sutobasu Yarou Show (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Sutobasu Yarou Shou is a three-on-three street basketball game from KID Corp and Bandai. It is based on the sports manga of the same name, which was serialized in popular manga anthology magazine Shounen Jump. The player's team is named the Jumps and is comprised of Kido Taro, Nagaoka Kyosuke and Akashi Show. They compete with other street basketball trios from the manga.The game is a 1994 Super Famicom exclusive. No other games were made with the license.
Game.Notes: A three-on-three street basketball game based on the sports manga of the same name, which was serialized in popular manga anthology magazine Shonen Jump. The player's team is named the Jumps and is comprised of Kido Taro, Nagaoka Kyosuke and Akashi Show. They compete with other street basketball trios from the manga.
